description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house with a flat and angular roofline, featuring a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, and a small poolside pavilion. The front of the house is lined with a row of tall, slender trees and a manicured lawn, while the rear opens up to an expansive outdoor living area. The structure is predominantly white with dark gray roofing and large glass windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open floor plan, and several outdoor seating and relaxation zones. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is surrounded by green landscaping, enhancing its upscale residential character.
description: A large, modern luxury house with a flat angular roof, expansive glass windows, a swimming pool, and manicured landscaping. The design features clean lines, geometric forms, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the row of tall trees, manicured lawn, and the main entrance with a dark angular roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long driveway, garage area, and the full length of the house with visible pool and outdoor lounge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the swimming pool, sun loungers, poolside pavilion, and large glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the tree-lined boundary, garage, and the house's elongated structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimalistic door, and a landscaped approach lined with tall trees.
